name: LOCUS POKER
short_description: Two-player strategy "board" game on a grid of playing cards. Easy to learn - difficult to master. Test your skill versus 8 computer opponents; or play a friend in-person or via Remote Play Together. Mouse and touchscreen compatible - touch-friendly. Try it for free with the FREE MINI-DUEL game.
detailed_description:
A head-to-head strategy "board" game played on a grid of face-up standard playing cards. Easy to learn and play, but very difficult to master. Luck will not help you - the better player wins. Play against eight computer opponents employing different strategies; or play against a human opponent, either in-person or via Steam's Remote Play Together. Compatible with mouse and touchscreen devices - touch-friendly.

RULES, GUIDE, EXAMPLES and TIPS are available in-game via the RULES button.

Try if for free with the FREE MINI-DUEL game.  If you like it, get the full version with different and tougher computer opponents, selectable card back designs, more game modes, and larger grid sizes.

THREE NEW PLAYING MODES:

2 TIMED GAMES (6 x 5) and MINI-DUEL (5 x 4) modes. Two consecutive games played on the same cards each game, but alternating who goes first. Turns have a countdown timer.  The truest tests in the game.

QUESO-BOT CHALLENGE! single player mode.

When playing in this high difficulty configuration (Player 1 = QUESO-BOT; Player 2 = HUMAN; Grid = 6x5), the game will track your win streak and provide customized feedback based on your performance. (FYI - I rarely win in this mode, my longest win "streak" is an ignominious "2", and I genuinely hope you do better. - JW.)

supported_languages: English, Simplified Chinese, Russian, Turkish, Ukrainian, Japanese, Polish, Korean
